content: I will update `fetchTempleCatalog` and implement `itemNamesMap` state and the `fetchItemNames` function in `app/settings_detail.tsx`.

args.Description: "Implemented itemNamesMap, fetchItemNames, and expanded fetchTempleCatalog in settings_detail.tsx to dynamically resolve dynamic order titles and temples."
args.Instruction: "Add itemNamesMap state, expand fetchTempleCatalog to fetch from one_rupee_poojas and problem_poojas, and add the fetchItemNames helper."
